title: Chapter 1
content:
Chapter 1: Chapter 1: YES/YES!!!

"Hah... I guess I don’t have any choice anymore..." Owen sighed heavily as he sat down on a bench near the park... feeling a great burden added to his already heavy back.

He had finally been fired after a major mess-up at the company, leaving him entirely unemployed... and dead broke on top of that.

He lived in a simple apartment, having moved in right after graduating from college to find a better opportunity, and once for all...get rich, unfortunately his life turned into a shitty mess

For two years, he had worked a job with minimum earnings...just enough to feed himself every day and afford the occasional simple delightful meal.

It was nothing more, nothing less and he already accepted that fact...and finally now it’s sealed once and for all.

However, he truly loved playing video games...well most men loved playing games.

And now he was currently on the verge of finishing his absolute favorite one.

In fact, he was probably going to beat it today.

The game was entirely centered around a man living in a village, completing various tasks and deeds to completely satisfy a cast of heavenly MILFs.

It was definitely highly enjoyable for a single man like him, with complete freedom in the game, he was able to enjoy doing some "self-service" every single night before going to sleep...

Thankfully, he possessed a great asset in his own arsenal...a freaking 12-inch long cock.

Unfortunately, he strictly believed in the saying, "A broke man deserves no cat!" because of this personal rule, he had completely refrained from pursuing a real relationship in his life.

The game was very similar to an infamous title called "Spring Time Saga" that he used to play back when he was a teenager, though this was a much better version with high quality graphics and a vastly superior storyline.

....

After seating for few minutes...

"Time to go... I just need to complete the game tonight and find a new job tomorrow. Maybe I can score enough good luck if I finish the game right?" Owen stood up, deciding it was finally time for him to complete his mission like a true man of culture and a warrior.

Owen began his walk back as the night slowly approached.

He was far too dirt poor to even pay for bus fare, which made things a living hell since his apartment was so far away.

Owen literally walked for an entire hour before he finally stood right in front of his apartment door.

"Hahh... I finally arrived." Owen was breathing heavily. The long walk had really done a number on his body, and when added to the lingering fatigue from what turned out to be his last day of work, it was pure hell.

But it was over anyway; he had arrived safely, and that was all that mattered.

Creak...

He opened the door with a rush of excitement. Finally, his long-awaited completion of the game was about to reach its grand conclusion!

Without any hesitation, he walked over to his PC and booted up the game.

The title screen immediately popped up:

-MILF VILLAGE-

[Welcome back, player!]

The text flashed on the screen as a welcoming ceremony for his arrival.

"Haha... nothing really beats this kind of scene." Owen already prepared his "weapons" as the impending battle was about to begin.

On the left side of his desk, there was literally a whole pack of unused tissues, while an empty trash bucket sat right by his side.

He was truly prepared from the inside out.

"Huh... why does it keep hanging like this?" Owen muttered, growing curious as he stared at the screen.

The loading screen was taking an unusually long time, and the monitor even flickered with a blue tint.

This was definitely the first time he had ever experienced this kind of error throughout his long journey with the game.

"Must be a bug, right?" he questioned himself as the loading bar stopped moving completely, but he didn’t have to keep waiting for long before a new prompt suddenly popped up on the screen.

-MILF VILLAGE!-

[DO YOU WANT TO ENTER THE GAME?]

[YES / YES!!!]

"What? That’s new... and what the heck is wrong with that button. There isn’t even a ’No’ choice, since both options are just ’Yes’..." Owen was definitely weirded out by the strange display, but he didn’t care about a minor glitch like that.

He had waited all day for this moment, so why would he waste a single second of his time?

"Let’s go! Hehe, I’ll choose the option on the right side... it’s somewhat funny to see three exclamation points." It was a choice made on pure whim, and honestly, why not?

There was no rule saying he couldn’t do whatever he wanted with his own game.

It was his life, and he was free to do as he pleased.

He had already lost his job, so his personal restraints were completely undone to the absolute limit; it wasn’t like there was someone else controlling his actions anyway.

He was confident enough to announce to the whole world that he was a free, broke, and jobless man!

’Ahem... it’s a bit weird to phrase it like that.’ Owen thought to himself. It wasn’t really necessary to include those specific words.

At the end of the day, he was just a free man.

Owen tapped his mouse and selected the option on the right side...and then a bizarre thing happened!

His entire room began to twist violently as space itself folded in a completely weird way.

The monitor screen grew larger and larger until it completely swallowed his entire body into the void!

Thud...

The bottle of lotion resting right next to his tissues fell onto the floor.

Everything in the room immediately returned to normal, and the entire apartment felt exactly the same as it always did, as if nothing out of the ordinary had happened at all.

But... Owen had completely disappeared.
